nasb.text: and Dishon and Ezer and Dishan. These are the chiefs descended from the Horites, the sons of Seir in the land of Edom.

esv.text: Dishon, Ezer, and Dishan; these are the chiefs of the Horites, the sons of Seir in the land of Edom.

cnv.text: 底順、以察和底珊。這些人是以東地何利人西珥子孫中的族長。

ccb.text: 底顺、以察、底珊。他们都是以东境内何利人西珥的子孙中的族长。

csbs.text: 底顺、以察、底珊。 这些是以东地何利人西珥子孙中的族长。
